mapper.select: SELECT TEST_NO, TEST_NM, TEST_DESC, WRTR_EMP_NO, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM FROM TEST_MST WHERE TEST_NO = #{testNo}
SELECT QST_NO, TEST_NO, QST_NM FROM QUESTION WHERE TEST_NO = #{testNo} ORDER BY QST_NO
SELECT qi.ITEM_NO, qi.QST_NO, qi.ITEM_CN, qi.ITEM_TYPE FROM QUESTION_ITEM qi JOIN QUESTION q ON q.QST_NO = qi.QST_NO WHERE q.TEST_NO = #{testNo} ORDER BY qi.QST_NO, qi.ITEM_NO
SELECT EMP_NO, DEPT_CD, POS_CD, EMP_NM, PWD, HIRE_DT, EMP_EMAIL, HP_NO, RRNO, ZIP_CD, ADDR1, ADDR2, EMP_STAT_CD, ACNT_ACT_YN, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM FROM EMP WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}

SELECT e.EMP_NO AS empNo, e.EMP_NM AS empNm, d.DEPT_NM AS deptNm, p.POS_NM AS posNm, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RSPNS r WHERE r.TEST_NO = #{testNo} AND r.RSPNR_EMP_NO = #{rspnrEmpNo} AND r.TRGT_EMP_NO = e.EMP_NO AND r.RSPNS_DTM >= #{startDate} AND r.RSPNS_DTM < #{endDate} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS doneYn FROM EMP e LEFT JOIN DEPT d ON d.DEPT_CD = e.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST p ON p.POS_CD = e.POS_CD WHERE e.EMP_NO <> #{rspnrEmpNo} AND e.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} ORDER BY d.DEPT_NM, p.POS_LVL, e.EMP_NM
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_RSPNS_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO RSPNS ( RSPNS_NO, TEST_NO, RSPNR_EMP_NO, TRGT_EMP_NO, RSPNS_DTM, ACTN_TYPE_RSLT ) VALUES ( #{rspnsNo}, #{testNo}, #{rspnrEmpNo}, #{trgtEmpNo}, SYSDATE, #{actnTypeRslt} )

SELECT SEQ_RSPNS_RSLT_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO RSPNS_RSLT ( RSPNS_RSLT_NO, ITEM_NO, RSPNS_NO, RSPNS_VAL ) VALUES ( #{rspnsRsltNo}, #{itemNo}, #{rspnsNo}, #{rspnsVal} )
